name: google-slides
description: Work with Google Slides decks and import presentation files using the configured Google Slides app connector.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and edit Google Slides decks
interface.longDescription: Use Google Slides to import presentation files, inspect deck structure, polish slide layouts, repair repeated template issues, and migrate deck content onto a company template through the connected Google Slides app.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a deck and clean up slide layouts
